Program: Payhip Built-in Affiliate (if migrating from Etsy)

Notes: Best option IF Seedwarden ever migrates from Etsy to a direct storefront. Built-in affiliate dashboard — no third-party network fees. Set custom commission rates per product. 30-day cookie. Program: Seedwarden Native Affiliate (manual tracking via Etsy coupon codes)
Type: DIY Affiliate (Etsy coupon codes as proxy)
Commission Rate: 0% platform fee — all revenue stays with seller
Payment Terms: Manual PayPal or Venmo transfer; negotiated case-by-case
Notes: The current Phase 3 approach: assign each influencer a unique 15% discount coupon code (e.g., ROSALEE15) as an Etsy coupon. Track sales via Etsy coupon redemption reports. Pay affiliates monthly via PayPal at agreed rate (10–20% of sale price). No software required. No network fees. Limitation: manual tracking; no automated commission calculation. Viable for up to ~15 active affiliates before spreadsheet management becomes burdensome. This is the recommended Phase 3 implementation — zero setup cost, launches with first influencer agreement.
